allow: Bash(node -e "const { chromium } = require\('playwright'\); \(async \(\) => { const b = await chromium.launch\({ headless: true }\); const p = await b.newPage\(\); await p.goto\('http://localhost:5175'\); await p.waitForTimeout\(2000\); await p.screenshot\({ path: '/tmp/taskflow_home.png' }\); // click first task card to open modal const card = await p.\\$\('[data-testid=\\"task-card\\"]'\) || await p.\\$\('.cursor-pointer'\); if\(card\) { await card.click\(\); await p.waitForTimeout\(800\); await p.screenshot\({ path: '/tmp/taskflow_modal.png' }\); } await b.close\(\); }\)\(\)")
